details.test: Task 1: Add most recent MegaWin Lotto qualifying draw to Watchlist
Task 2: Create and download Daily Pick 4 30-day detailed report as PDF
Task 3: Set game with better jackpot odds as preferred
Task 4: Save MegaWin Lotto number checker search with at least 3 matches
Task 5: Add MegaWin Lotto number frequency widget to dashboard
Task 6: Create in-portal alert for MegaWin Lotto jackpots over $20M
Task 7: Tag January 2026 MegaWin Lotto rollover draws with Review later
Task 8: Bookmark top 3 Springfield retailers and save list
Task 9: Create MegaWin Lotto weekday summary report with average jackpots > 3M
